title: Monitoring status badge
description: Colour-coded badge for alert / incident / health-check-run status. Alert statuses: firing danger; acknowledged warning; resolved success; suppressed neutral; expired neutral. Incident statuses: open danger; acknowledged warning; investigating info; mitigating info; resolved success; postmortem neutral. HealthCheckRun statuses: healthy success; degraded warning; unhealthy danger; timeout danger; error danger; unknown neutral.

variant.$expr: props.status === 'firing' || props.status === 'open' || props.status === 'unhealthy' || props.status === 'timeout' || props.status === 'error' ? 'danger' : (props.status === 'acknowledged' || props.status === 'degraded' ? 'warning' : (props.status === 'investigating' || props.status === 'mitigating' ? 'info' : (props.status === 'resolved' || props.status === 'healthy' ? 'success' : 'neutral')))

leadingIcon.$expr: props.showIcon ? (props.status === 'firing' || props.status === 'open' || props.status === 'unhealthy' ? 'fire' : (props.status === 'acknowledged' ? 'clock' : (props.status === 'resolved' || props.status === 'healthy' ? 'check-circle' : (props.status === 'degraded' ? 'exclamation-triangle' : (props.status === 'timeout' ? 'signal-slash' : (props.status === 'error' ? 'x-circle' : (props.status === 'postmortem' ? 'document-text' : (props.status === 'investigating' || props.status === 'mitigating' ? 'magnifying-glass' : 'ellipsis-horizontal-circle')))))))) : null
